item.title: About
item.description:
devashish.me https://devashish.me/about/ -

I am a seasoned technology leader with 15+ years of experience scaling engineering organizations and driving product innovation. Having worked with four early-stage startups, including two successful exits, I’ve built enterprise and consumer products from the ground up. My startup journey includes participating in the Techstars Seattle accelerator, where I was part of the founding team that scaled from inception to acquisition.

On the technical front, I’ve architected and built products serving both enterprise and consumer markets. Through developer experience improvements and AI-powered initiatives, I’ve driven up to 50% improvement in engineering velocity. My DevOps, automation, and cost optimization strategies have reduced operational and infrastructure costs by 60%. I’ve designed multi-cloud strategies leveraging AWS, GCP, and Azure, while also building on-premises solutions for enterprises with complex compliance requirements. These architectures handle millions of daily operations and have scaled to serve tens of thousands of users globally.

As an engineering leader, I’ve built and managed distributed teams of 40+ engineers, establishing engineering career paths and organizational structures that foster growth. Working closely with executive leadership teams, I’ve driven organizational outcomes including COGS optimization and strategic technology investments. My leadership scope includes vendor and partner management, ensuring successful integrations and maximizing value from external relationships. I specialize in creating automation-first cultures that not only optimize developer productivity but also foster team learning and cross-functional collaboration.

When not working, I enjoy cooking, reading, hiking, running, and riding my motorcycle.

You can connect with me on LinkedIn.

Disclaimers:

  • All views expressed on this site are my own and do not represent the opinions of my employers or any other organization.
  • All images © 2025 Devashish Meena.
- https://devashish.me/about/ - 2025 Devashish Meena; All rights reserved

item.title: Initial Commit
item.description:
devashish.me https://devashish.me/posts/initial_commit/ -

For the V4 version of this blog, I’ve decided to remove all the old entries and start from scratch. With one significant change though: posting tech content only.

Over time I’ve lost interest in writing travel blogs and inflicting my unfiltered thoughts on public forums. At the same time, I’d started documenting my experiences and learnings at work, conversations with other people in industry and takeaways from reading up on the topics that excite me.

I (re)started this blog with a few objectives

  • Document my journey in building tech solutions
  • Keep notes about interesting concepts, their implementations and other aspects
  • Have discussion(s) about the “right” way to solve problems

To new beginnings!

- https://devashish.me/posts/initial_commit/ - 2025 Devashish Meena; All rights reserved
